blocker.message: bq cannot refresh the active gcloud account token in non-interactive execution.
blocker.error_prefix: There was a problem refreshing your current auth tokens: Reauthentication failed. cannot prompt during non-interactive execution.

validated_before_block: GCP http_text and generic http_file text materialization pass local adapter smoke tests.
The adapter renders BigQuery source_materialization plans with declared schema_fields.
The smoke runtime converts text lines to newline-delimited JSON before BigQuery load.
required_to_unblock: Run gcloud auth login interactively for marco@intentus.dev or switch to a non-expired authenticated account.
Run the real BigQuery http_text smoke and read back target/evidence rows.
Replace this blocker with a PASS report if the contract-only execution succeeds.
